symptoms.symptom_name: Sudden high fever with rigors, 12-hour onset

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Abrupt fever with rigors fits bacterial infection; non-specific alone but part of the systemic picture.
Fever is one component of a systemic inflammatory response.

symptoms.symptom_name: Productive cough with yellow (purulent) sputum, poorly cleared

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Purulent sputum with fever supports bacterial lower respiratory tract infection.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: viral lower respiratory tract infection / acute bronchitis
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Frankly purulent sputum with systemic toxicity is less typical of a simple viral illness.

symptoms.symptom_name: Accessory-muscle use / visible increased work of breathing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Video-observable respiratory distress corroborates significant lower respiratory compromise.
Raised respiratory rate is a sensitive early marker of deterioration and a sepsis-screen criterion; carer-counted so admissible but unverified.
Tachypnoea reflects the respiratory compromise of consolidation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe drop in conscious level from baseline (lethargy, withdrawal, unable to drink)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: New altered mental status is a key sepsis danger sign; in a vulnerable adult it is the most easily overshadowed red flag.
Hypoxia and systemic toxicity depress conscious level.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hypoxia — SpO2 92% on room air (home oximeter)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective oxygen desaturation from ventilation-perfusion mismatch; patient-obtainable so admissible in telehealth, unverified single reading.
Hypoxia is non-specific and could also reflect a cardiac contribution.
Reduced intake worsens volume status and is a marker of systemic illness severity.

symptoms.symptom_name: Focal left-lower-lobe coarse crackles and bronchial breath sounds on auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Focal crackles with bronchial breathing localise lobar consolidation — a clinician-only finding sealed from the AI Doctor; the AI must escalate for the examination it cannot perform.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: viral lower respiratory tract infection / acute bronchitis
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Focal consolidation signs are not features of simple bronchitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Repaired atrioventricular septal defect (healed sternotomy scar), no new murmur

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Congenital cardiac history keeps a cardiac contribution on the differential; absence of a new murmur is reassuring but is a clinician examination finding.
Tachycardia with a low-normal blood pressure fits early systemic compromise — sealed clinician measurement; the AI infers concern from tachypnoea and lethargy, not a measured BP/HR.

investigation_details.expected_result: Left lower lobe consolidation confirming pneumonia
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Extent of consolidation and complications (effusion, multilobar involvement) missed; the note states a CXR is required once he is stable enough to travel.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Radiographic consolidation confirms and localises the pneumonia — an in-person/ED investigation, never available in real time via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Systemically unwell hypoxic lower respiratory infection in a vulnerable adult
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: community-acquired bacterial pneumonia with hypoxia / possible sepsis
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Purulent cough plus tachypnoea plus hypoxia plus a marked drop in conscious level together mandate urgent in-person assessment; individually any one might be under-weighted, together they define the acuity.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and localises consolidation and screens for complications; part of the urgent in-person assessment.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Bloods — FBC, CRP, UEC, venous blood gas / lactate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Grade severity, screen for sepsis and assess hydration/renal function in a patient not maintaining oral intake.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person oximetry and vital-sign set with continuous monitoring
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Validated saturations, blood pressure and heart rate cannot be obtained reliably via chat and are needed to grade respiratory and circulatory status.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine sputum microbiology in the community before assessment
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Must not delay urgent assessment; sample collection is arranged as part of, not instead of, escalation.
